context: Tests whether the agent correctly defines the cart data model with all required fields, implements upsert semantics on add-to-cart, captures price at time of add, delegates quantity≤0 updates to remove, and always recalculates totals server-side.

checklist.name: Cart status field
checklist.description: Cart schema / data model includes a 'status' field with values that include 'active', 'abandoned', and 'converted'

checklist.name: Guest token field
checklist.description: Cart schema includes a guest_token field (UUID-based) for identifying guest carts, and user_id is null for guests

checklist.name: unit_price vs original_unit_price
checklist.description: Line item schema includes both a unit_price (price at time of add) and an original_unit_price (before discounts) field

checklist.name: Price captured at add time
checklist.description: addToCart captures the variant's price as unit_price at the time the item is added, not fetched dynamically on cart reads

checklist.name: Upsert on duplicate variant
checklist.description: addToCart checks whether the variant already exists in the cart and increments quantity rather than creating a duplicate line item

checklist.name: Delegate remove on qty ≤ 0
checklist.description: updateCartItem delegates to the remove function when the requested quantity is 0 or less, rather than setting quantity to 0

checklist.name: recalculateCart after mutation
checklist.description: recalculateCart (or equivalent) is called after every cart mutation: add, update, and remove

checklist.name: Server-side subtotal
checklist.description: subtotal is computed server-side as sum(unitPrice * quantity); totals are not accepted from the client

checklist.name: Discount applied server-side
checklist.description: Discount / coupon is applied server-side during recalculation; total = max(0, subtotal - discount)

checklist.name: Totals rounded to 2 decimals
checklist.description: subtotal, discountAmount, and total are rounded / fixed to 2 decimal places during recalculation

checklist.name: Stock validation on add
checklist.description: addToCart validates that the variant exists (404 if not found) and checks available stock before adding (409 if insufficient and backorders not allowed)
